rows.label: qev091402_MSG0001
rows.name: This is them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Hmm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0003
rows.name:
I've definitely never seen
one of these before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0004
rows.name: Right, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_JNK0010
rows.name: Wait

rows.label: qev091402_SEL0011
rows.name: Stand back and watch.

rows.label: qev091402_JNK0020
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev091402_SEL0021
rows.name:
Alert Fog Christoph to the risks
of touching an unknown object.

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0005
rows.name: Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0006
rows.name:
I know. But if my brother were here,
he wouldn't let that stop him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0007
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0008
rows.name: ...Hmm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0009
rows.name:
What strange organisms. I've
never seen anything like them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_JNK0030
rows.name: Assert

rows.label: qev091402_SEL0031
rows.name:
Claim that they are some
kind of new Growth weapon.

rows.label: qev091402_JNK0040
rows.name: Muse

rows.label: qev091402_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that they are just another
one of Mira's mysteries.

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0010
rows.name:
I don't know. I don't see much reason
for them to lay a trap out here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0011
rows.name:
I suppose so—though that isn't
very satisfying as answers go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0013
rows.name: No sense in idle speculation, I suppose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0014
rows.name:
Let's bring one back and have
the lab crew take a look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091402_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'm sure my friend Solan will
be able to help us out.[ST:wait ]
